CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET
PAGE 02
1
Ananya was already good at working in healthcare at work.
I wanted to improve how care is run.
2
But the next step needed an MBA she did not have.
How do I manage a hospital?
3
Then she found an online MBA in Healthcare Management.
I can grow without quitting my job!
4
Ananya enrolled and began leading with confidence.
From capable to qualified!

Why An MBA In Healthcare Management

  • 1
